name: write_image
description: Render SVG, HTML, or Mermaid diagram content to a PNG image file using a headless browser. Use this to create diagrams, charts, or visualizations. Output is saved as a PNG file in the project directory.

filename.description: Output image filename (relative to project work directory, e.g. 'diagram.png' or 'docs/flowchart.png')

type.description: Content type: 'svg' for SVG markup, 'html' for a full HTML page, 'mermaid' for Mermaid diagram syntax

content.description: The source content to render. For type=svg: raw SVG markup (e.g. '<svg>...</svg>'). For type=html: a complete HTML document. For type=mermaid: Mermaid diagram syntax (e.g. 'graph TD; A-->B;')
